name: hiding
description: Strip AI leakage from files before committing, pushing, or sharing. Removes secrets, AI self-reference, thought process traces, and rule citations.

interface.longDescription: Remove AI-generated artifacts (secrets, self-reference, thought process, rule citations) from files before committing or sharing. Cleaned files read as if written by a human.
defaultPrompt: Hide AI leakage from this file.
Clean secrets and AI traces from these files.
Scan for AI-generated artifacts before commit.
